ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Current version of the model */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status of the model */,
  "hyperparameter_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific set of hyperparameters used */,
  "optimization_algorithm" TEXT /* Optimization algorithm used */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_hyperparameter_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_set_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model these hyperparameters belong to */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of the trees */,
  "n_estimators" INTEGER /* Number of estimators */,
  "subsample" REAL /* Subsample ratio */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "min_child_weight" REAL /* Minimum child weight */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss function value */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate hyperparameters */,
  "search_space" TEXT /* Search space for hyperparameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model for which the optimization was performed */,
  "best_score" REAL /* Best score achieved during optimization */,
  "best_params" TEXT /* Best hyperparameters found */,
  "run_time" REAL /* Time taken to run the optimization */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the optimization started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the optimization ended */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Optimization algorithm used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization run */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the optimization run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who contributed */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's contribution */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "training_metrics" TEXT /* Additional training metrics */,
  "test_metrics" TEXT /* Additional test metrics */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_hyperparameters" (
  "version_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters for a model version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of the trees */,
  "n_estimators" INTEGER /* Number of estimators */,
  "subsample" REAL /* Subsample ratio */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "min_child_weight" REAL /* Minimum child weight */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss function value */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate hyperparameters */,
  "search_space" TEXT /* Search space for hyperparameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy achieved during evaluation */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision achieved during evaluation */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall achieved during evaluation */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score achieved during evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Additional evaluation metrics */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "data_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the dataset to ensure integrity */,
  "data_format_version" TEXT /* Format version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment configuration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "python_version" TEXT /* Python version used */,
  "library_versions" TEXT /* Versions of libraries used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Description of the environment configuration */,
  "system_info" TEXT /* System information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_configs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
